incidents.summary: Payment DB pool saturated after checkout traffic burst, causing checkout 5xx and edge latency.
incidents.remediation: Increase pool temporarily, rollback risky payment deploy, inspect slow queries.

incidents.summary: Recommender batch retrain leaked memory and restarted pods.
incidents.remediation: Disable retrain job and restart affected pods.

incidents.summary: Search index CPU high during reindex job, causing search latency warnings.
incidents.remediation: Throttle reindex job and add capacity to search index.

incidents.summary: Redis eviction caused cart latency and checkout degradation.
incidents.remediation: Increase Redis memory and reduce cart cache TTL.
